name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-29
title: Version skew (spec 1.1.0 vs SKILL/feature 1.0.0); Inv 7 vacuous test; contract.md missing exit 1 documentation
description:
Multiple integrity issues:
1. Version skew: spec.md frontmatter is version: 1.1.0 while SKILL.md and feature.json are 1.0.0. Either the SKILL/feature bump was forgotten or the spec was bumped without a surface change.
2. Inv 7 ('no inline python3 -c calls or heredocs') is tested by test-no-inline-python3.py but the file only confirms shebang presence; no assertion greps resolve-scope.py for 'python3 -c' or heredoc patterns. Vacuously enforced.
3. contract.md documents only exit 0/2; code emits exit 1 for runtime errors (find-feature failure, format-feature-context failure, RABBIT_ROOT unresolved), tested by BUG-4 and BUG-6 but undocumented in the contract.
Fix: reconcile the version (pick the right one, sync); rewrite test-no-inline-python3.py to actually grep resolve-scope.py for forbidden patterns; add exit 1 documentation to contract.md.
